title: Iran-US messages continue via intermediaries despite 'suspension' — Trump: 'this weekend'; Araghchi: 'final formula'
snippet: Despite Iran's formal suspension of talks, messaging between the US and Iran continues through intermediaries. Trump maintains a deal could happen 'this weekend' while Araghchi says both sides are working on a 'final formula.' The contradiction between official positions and back-channel activity continues.
tag_reason: 트럼프 'this weekend' 발언(src-1566)의 후속. 중개인 경유 메시지 지속이라는 새 정보 — 공식 중단 vs 비공식 소통 병존 구조 확인
